name: Cloak and Dagger
description: A stealthy kit focused on light armor and precise strikes with small weapons. Favored by shadows and rogues.

name: Shining Armor
description: Heavy plate and a shield make you a bastion on the battlefield. Slower but nearly impervious to harm.

name: Raider
description: Medium armor and a versatile weapon let you move quickly while hitting hard. A balanced choice for front-line fighters.

name: Ranger
description: Light armor and a bow let you strike from a distance. Stay mobile and pick off targets before they close in.

name: Whirlwind
description: No armor, just speed and fury. You rely on mobility and aggression, striking everything around you.

name: Frigid
description: A caster kit focused on cold magic. Your spells slow and freeze enemies, controlling the battlefield.
